name: Claim of Right Tax Computation

eligibility.description: Applies if the taxpayer included an item in gross income in a prior year because they appeared to have an unrestricted right to it, but later discovered they did not.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a tax benefit (via cross-reference to Section 1341) when a taxpayer must restore a substantial amount held under a claim of right from a prior year.
